name: commune-fortune
description: A private static slot-style game with Mystery Tokens, authoritative math, Choose Your Ally, mobile-safe effects, and persistent chainable free spins.

scripts.test: node tools/feature-tests.mjs && node tools/presentation-tests.mjs && node tools/polish-tests.mjs && node tools/ally-tests.mjs && node tools/mystery-tests.mjs && node tools/qa-tests.mjs && node tools/reel-reaction-tests.mjs && node tools/audio-tests.mjs && node tools/simulate.mjs --check && node tools/simulate-mystery-scatter.mjs --cycles=5000 --ally-cycles=2000 --seed=1297634388 --check
